path: Problem: Generate a periodic cashflow schedule across date headers, paying interest on coupon dates determined by frequency working backward from maturity, adding principal at maturity, and returning a placeholder for non-payment dates

Action: Use YEARFRAC to compute month distance, MOD to test coupon periodicity, EOMONTH to align maturity to month-end, EDATE to enforce cutoff, and boolean multiplication/addition to return cashflow amounts

Observation: Coupon dates can be detected by checking whether the number of months between the header date and maturity month-end is an exact multiple of the coupon interval (12/frequency); month-end alignment avoids day-of-month mismatches when headers are month-end dates
